query: A PR just got shipped — keep watching it until every required check is green.
Why isn't my PR merging? Tell me exactly what's blocking the PR.
Is PR #212 ready to merge yet?
My PR has been sitting for an hour with no merge — poll the PR and tell me what's wrong.
One of the checks failed on my pull request — kick off a re-run of the required job.
Keep an eye on my open PRs and babysit them toward merge.
Start the shepherd daemon so my open PRs get watched.
Watch the pull request and let me know when it's mergeable.
What's the current PR verdict on #90 — read it back for me.
Fix all the CodeRabbit and Greptile comments on my PR and resolve each review thread.
Push my validated feature branch and open a pull request from the template.
The PR merged to master — run the post-merge health check and close the linked issue.
Where am I in the workflow and what work is still in flight right now?
